criteria.label: State the softmax formula and compute π for small integer logits.
criteria.example: z = [1, 0, 0]: compute exp, normalize, verify π ≈ [0.576, 0.212, 0.212] and sum π = 1.

criteria.label: Implement stable log-sum-exp and log-softmax without overflow.
criteria.example: For z = [1000, 999, 998], return log π via z − log_sum_exp(z); confirm finite values and exp(log π) sums to 1.

criteria.label: Match softmax to cross-entropy loss on logits in a framework.
criteria.example: Show F.cross_entropy(logits, y) equals manual −log_softmax(logits)[y] on a 3-class toy tensor.

criteria.label: Choose softmax vs sigmoid for a given label structure.
criteria.example: Given single MNIST digit vs three independent defect flags, justify softmax for the former and three sigmoids for the latter.
